task_description: Implement camera and screen capture with multimodal AI grounding for Phase 41 Quant Live. Adds frame capture from camera/screen, multimodal grounding (image + text to LLM), context retrieval across Quant apps, and pipeline integration.

verification.summary: All 131 tests pass (107 existing + 24 new). TypeScript typecheck clean. Review feedback addressed: FPS cap on ScreenCapture, autoStart removed, onError callbacks added, callback unsubscribe functions, latestFrame nulled on stop.
